phrases.intent_en: Ask where the aquarium entrance is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso dell'Acquario di Genova?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh del-ak-KWAH-ryoh dee JEH-noh-vah?
phrases.cultural_note: Genoa's aquarium is the largest in Europe and the city's most visited attraction.

responses.english: Right here at the Porto Antico, you can't miss it.
responses.phonetic: PROH-pryoh kwee, al POR-toh AN-tee-koh, non see PWOH man-KAH-reh.
responses.french: Proprio qui, al Porto Antico, non si può mancare.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take a boat tour of the port
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove partono le gite in barca nel porto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh PAR-toh-noh leh JEE-teh een BAR-kah nel POR-toh?

responses.english: From the pier near the Bigo crane, down there.
responses.phonetic: dal MOH-loh vee-CHEE-noh al BEE-goh, lee een FON-doh.
responses.french: Dal molo vicino al Bigo, lì in fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Bigo structure is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, cos'è quella struttura bianca lì?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, koh-ZEH KWEL-lah strut-TOO-rah BYAN-kah lee?
phrases.cultural_note: The Bigo is a crane-inspired structure by Renzo Piano built for the 1992 Colombus Expo — its panoramic lift offers harbour views.

responses.english: It's Renzo Piano's Bigo, with a panoramic lift.
responses.phonetic: eh eel BEE-goh dee REN-tsoh PYAH-noh, kon ah-shen-SOH-reh pah-noh-RAH-mee-koh.
responses.french: È il Bigo di Renzo Piano, con ascensore panoramico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat at the waterfront
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un buon posto per mangiare qui al porto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon bwohn POS-toh per man-JAH-reh kwee al POR-toh?

responses.english: Yes, several restaurants along the pier.
responses.phonetic: see, dee-VER-see rees-toh-RAN-tee LOON-goh eel MOH-loh.
responses.french: Sì, diversi ristoranti lungo il molo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get from Porto Antico to the old town
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge il centro storico dal Porto Antico?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh eel CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh dal POR-toh AN-tee-koh?

responses.english: On foot, five minutes heading north.
responses.phonetic: ah PYEH-dee, CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee VER-soh nord.
responses.french: A piedi, cinque minuti verso nord.
